summary: Confirmed Tax Code condition-row bug: End Date auto-populates to Start Date after save even when End Date was not explicitly entered.
derived_updates: Tax Code Condition row on Create page can persist END DATE equal to START DATE without explicit End Date input.
Issue is a user-visible functional/data-integrity defect, not only an automation caveat.
Bug report was sent to Telegram with role context: qautomation (End User).
